images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunning Japanese idol‑style model, 20 ≈ 22 years old, with flawless yet pores‑visible skin, luminous vellus‑hair glow, expressive almond eyes, and straight black silky hair. She sits at a sun‑drenched window seat of a high‑end Tokyo café, softly lit by gentle indoor daylight that wraps the scene in a clean, bright atmosphere. She wears a fitted denim jacket over a cropped, sheer lace‑top that hugs her ample bust and slim waist, its sleeves casually rolled up, revealing a hint of the delicate lace beneath. Her expression is a shy, down‑turned smile, eyes flicking just above the lens as if sharing a secret with the viewer. The background blurs into creamy bokeh, with subtle film‑grain and warm color grading that give a nostalgic, edgy vibe. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, global illumination, ray‑traced highlights, creating a cinematic, tactile realism.8k photo, Large breasts
